_note: FALLBACK DATA — researched snapshot, not live. Replace at runtime via Google Places API (New) once GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY + place_id are set. See src/lib/places.ts.

reviews.author: Tanvi Joshi
reviews.text: Godwit finally in Nagpur and it's stunning! Civil Lines' prettiest new cafe. The Biscoff shake and loaded nachos were perfect for the feed and the tummy.

reviews.author: Aditya Deshmukh
reviews.text: Fresh, aesthetic and pure veg. The wood-fired pizza had a gorgeous crust. Belgian chocolate jar is dangerously good. Already planning my next visit.

reviews.author: Riya Bhandari
reviews.text: Beautiful interiors and great vibe for a new opening. Cheese sizzler was a showstopper. A little crowded since it just launched, but worth it.

reviews.author: Nikhil Tiwari
reviews.text: So glad a premium pure-veg multicuisine spot opened here. Mezze platter and pesto pasta were both excellent. Lovely place for a date.

reviews.author: Sara Khanna
reviews.text: Trendy, polished and Instagram-ready. Desserts are the star. Looking forward to seeing the menu expand as they settle in.
